# Golden East Agricultural Development

## About
Golden East Agricultural Development is an Egyptian company specializing in plant nutrition solutions and agricultural fertilizers. Founded in 2016, the company serves growers across Egypt with science-driven crop nutrition programs.

## Products
- Fertilizers (NPK, Calcium, Potassium, Micronutrients)
- Soil treatment solutions
- Specialty plant nutrition products

## Categories
- Calcium Fertilizers
- NPK Fertilizers
- Potassium Fertilizers
- Micronutrient Mixes
- Soil Salinity Treatments

## Location
Light Industries Industrial Zone, Beni Suef, Egypt

## Website
https://goldeneast-agri.com

## Social
- Facebook: https://facebook.com/goldeneastagri
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/golden_east.agri
- WhatsApp: Contact via website

## Languages
- English (en)
- Arabic (ar)

## Purpose
B2B quote request platform for agricultural inputs. Customers browse products, build quote requests, and submit contact information for sales follow-up. No e-commerce, no payments, no user accounts.
